checkpoint_summary: The campaign repaired a semantic collision between Atlas Sunset and a low-level continuity command, established lesson-harvest governance and campaign control, enforced Feather/Sunset/Sunrise bindings, reconciled Prime Ascendant after PRs 236 and 237, and reached the final authored closeout without authorizing runtime, infrastructure, Gitea cutover, route retirement, or repository settings.

protected_data.clean_summary: Only sanitized doctrine, public repository identities, exact public Git evidence, and clean evidence pointers are included. No credentials, private network values, PHI, raw finance data, unrestricted logs, or protected payloads are present.
